'''âg-k-h''' ('''gakaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calypso|calypso]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-k-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calypso|calypso]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-k-h
|-
! Lemma
| gakaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gakahithi|gakahithi]] || [[word:gakahiji|gakahiji]] || [[word:gakahishi|gakahishi]] || [[word:gakahi|gakahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gakahuthuth|gakahuthuth]] || [[word:gakahujuj|gakahujuj]] || [[word:gakahushush|gakahushush]] || [[word:gakah|gakah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gakahuthu|gakahuthu]] || [[word:gakahuju|gakahuju]] || [[word:gakahushu|gakahushu]] || [[word:gakahu|gakahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gakahufuth|gakahufuth]] || [[word:gakahufuj|gakahufuj]] || [[word:gakahufush|gakahufush]] || [[word:gakahuf|gakahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gakahethe|gakahethe]] || [[word:gakaheje|gakaheje]] || [[word:gakaheshe|gakaheshe]] || [[word:gakahe|gakahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gakahothoth|gakahothoth]] || [[word:gakahojoj|gakahojoj]] || [[word:gakahoshosh|gakahoshosh]] || [[word:gakah|gakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gakahotho|gakahotho]] || [[word:gakahojo|gakahojo]] || [[word:gakahosho|gakahosho]] || [[word:gakaho|gakaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gakahofoth|gakahofoth]] || [[word:gakahofoj|gakahofoj]] || [[word:gakahofosh|gakahofosh]] || [[word:gakahof|gakahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gakahĂŠthĂŠ|gakahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gakahĂŠjĂŠ|gakahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gakahĂŠshĂŠ|gakahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gakahĂŠ|gakahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gakahathath|gakahathath]] || [[word:gakahajaj|gakahajaj]] || [[word:gakahashash|gakahashash]] || [[word:gakah|gakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gakahatha|gakahatha]] || [[word:gakahaja|gakahaja]] || [[word:gakahasha|gakahasha]] || [[word:gakaha|gakaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gakahafath|gakahafath]] || [[word:gakahafaj|gakahafaj]] || [[word:gakahafash|gakahafash]] || [[word:gakahaf|gakahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gakahasha|gakahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogakahasha|gogakahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigakahasha|gokigakahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gakahnĂŒsha|gakahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogakahnknĂŒsha|gogakahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigakahnĂŒsha|gokigakahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gakahshĂ«sha|gakahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogakahnkshĂ«sha|gogakahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigakahshĂ«sha|gokigakahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gakahrosha|gakahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogakahnkrosha|gogakahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigakahrosha|gokigakahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gakahmusha|gakahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogakahnkmusha|gogakahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigakahmusha|gokigakahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gakahsherasha|gakahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogakahnksherasha|gogakahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigakahsherasha|gokigakahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gakahngasha|gakahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogakahnkngasha|gogakahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigakahngasha|gokigakahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gakahyasha|gakahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogakahnkyasha|gogakahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigakahyasha|gokigakahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gakahyamasha|gakahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogakahnkyamasha|gogakahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigakahyamasha|gokigakahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gakahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gakahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogakahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gogakahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigakahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokigakahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gakahnĂŒrosha|gakahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogakahnknĂŒrosha|gogakahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigakahnĂŒrosha|gokigakahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gakahnĂŒmusha|gakahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogakahnknĂŒmusha|gogakahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigakahnĂŒmusha|gokigakahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gakahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gakahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogakahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gogakahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigakahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokigakahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gakahshĂ«rosha|gakahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogakahnkshĂ«rosha|gogakahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigakahshĂ«rosha|gokigakahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gakahshĂ«musha|gakahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogakahnkshĂ«musha|gogakahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigakahshĂ«musha|gokigakahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gakahronĂŒsha|gakahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogakahnkronĂŒsha|gogakahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigakahronĂŒsha|gokigakahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gakahroshĂ«sha|gakahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogakahnkroshĂ«sha|gogakahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigakahroshĂ«sha|gokigakahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gakahromusha|gakahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogakahnkromusha|gogakahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigakahromusha|gokigakahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gakahmunĂŒsha|gakahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogakahnkmunĂŒsha|gogakahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigakahmunĂŒsha|gokigakahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gakahmushĂ«sha|gakahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogakahnkmushĂ«sha|gogakahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigakahmushĂ«sha|gokigakahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gakahmurosha|gakahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogakahnkmurosha|gogakahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigakahmurosha|gokigakahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gakah|gakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:gĂŠkĂŠh|gĂŠkĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogakah|hogakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hogĂŠkĂŠh|hogĂŠkĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogakah|hohogakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogĂŠkĂŠh|hohogĂŠkĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒgakah|nĂŒgakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒgĂŠkĂŠh|nĂŒgĂŠkĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgakah|nĂŒnĂŒgakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠkĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠkĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻgakah|nĂŻgakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻgĂŠkĂŠh|nĂŻgĂŠkĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgakah|nĂŻnĂŻgakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠkĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠkĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugakah|lugakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lugĂŠkĂŠh|lugĂŠkĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugakah|lulugakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugĂŠkĂŠh|lulugĂŠkĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligakah|ligakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ligĂŠkĂŠh|ligĂŠkĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligakah|liligakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligĂŠkĂŠh|liligĂŠkĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogakah|kogakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kogĂŠkĂŠh|kogĂŠkĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogakah|kokogakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogĂŠkĂŠh|kokogĂŠkĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegakah|kegakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kegĂŠkĂŠh|kegĂŠkĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegakah|kekegakah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegĂŠkĂŠh|kekegĂŠkĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
